objective: Independently review, verify, and integrate the V11 Specialist Compiler candidate for owner approval.

assumptions.statement: The six work units are stable atomic responsibilities for this release review.
assumptions.rationale: They were derived from the accepted V11 spec and have disjoint review or integration ownership.

assumptions.statement: The integration owner retains the approved compilation and package digests outside the rendered package.
assumptions.rationale: Package verification is trustworthy only when the expected digest pair comes from an independent approval record.

assumptions.statement: The external IDE host enforces actual context, permission, workspace, and process boundaries.
assumptions.rationale: The V11 compiler emits provider-neutral task demand and performs no runtime effects.

assumptions.statement: Work, startup, and handoff values are relative planning units rather than elapsed-time forecasts.
assumptions.rationale: V11 compares deterministic candidate structure and does not claim runtime benchmarking.

assumptions.statement: Any release document that integration may update is reviewed through an immutable pre-integration snapshot rather than its live output path.
assumptions.rationale: Authorized integration must not invalidate the exact candidate it consumes.

assumptions.statement: Every repository context source is byte-identical under the declared Git checkout rules, with no custom filter or working-tree encoding.
assumptions.rationale: A reviewed launch package must reconstruct from a clean checkout, not only the integration owner working tree.

unresolvedDecisions.question: Which IDE, models, and workspace isolation strategy should execute a future production roster?
unresolvedDecisions.proceedRationale: Runtime supply is explicitly outside the V11 compiler acceptance boundary and requires a later adapter decision.

acceptanceCriteria.description: The V11 product and public API match the owner goal and remain IDE, model, and provider neutral.

evidenceRequirements.description: Content-addressed product and API candidate sources.
Independent product and API acceptance review.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Candidate construction, scheduling, selection, and digest semantics are deterministic and accurately claimed.

evidenceRequirements.description: Content-addressed algorithm and test candidate sources.
Independent algorithm and lifecycle acceptance review.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Authority, context, privacy, rendering, and trace bindings fail closed.

evidenceRequirements.description: Content-addressed security and trace candidate sources.
Independent security and trace acceptance review.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Canonical verification and source-linked release evidence are complete before owner approval.

evidenceRequirements.description: Integrated V11 review, memory, and milestone artifacts.

The strict schema and provider-neutral boundary tests.
Shared diagnostics, evidence, and operation-result types.
The immutable pre-integration V11 product and acceptance contract.

forbiddenEffects: Do not access a network or provider.
Do not execute or dispatch runtime agents from core.
Do not widen reviewed filesystem authority.
Do not merge or update durable memory before integration review.
